title: Pursat Heavy Rain
lead: Pursat is experiencing extreme rain with a Z-Score of +3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Pursat is causing significant disruptions. 
 The high humidity of 87% and low wind speed of 5.1 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The CDD of 9.5 GG indicates a high energy demand for cooling.
